rationale: The candidate f488266b372c40606b62471e63dfd6ad471f7da6 is the best choice because it avoids the duplication of the 'Quick Links' heading found in the 'current' and 'qwen' versions. It also provides a more natural and professional translation of technical terms (e.g., using 'СУБД' for database systems and 'однострочники' for 1-liners) while maintaining Dan's direct style. It correctly preserves all MDX components and heading structures.
